title: Mini MBA in Business Management
description: A practical executive programme that builds core business and leadership capabilities for managers, entrepreneurs, and high-potential professionals. Participants strengthen decision-making across strategy, finance, marketing, operations, and people management.
whoShouldAttend: This course is designed for supervisors, team leads, business owners, functional specialists moving into management roles, and professionals preparing for broader leadership responsibilities.
outcomes: Apply strategic thinking frameworks to business planning and growth.
Interpret financial statements and use key metrics to support decisions.
Build high-performing teams with stronger leadership communication.
Develop customer-focused marketing and value proposition strategies.
Improve operational execution using process and performance tools.
Lead cross-functional initiatives with confidence and clarity.

topics.title: Strategic Management and Business Models
bullets: External environment analysis and competitive positioning
Business model design and value creation choices
Strategic priorities, risk, and execution planning

topics.title: Managerial Finance for Non-Finance Leaders
bullets: Reading profit and loss, balance sheet, and cash flow statements
Budgeting, forecasting, and cost control fundamentals

topics.title: Leadership, Teams, and Execution
bullets: Leadership styles and influence across teams
Coaching conversations and feedback for performance
Decision-making under pressure and change management
